member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Pause.IPrinter
member.summary: Printer to print message to Console.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Pause.PrimePauseTestMethod
member.summary: Test Method for Pause n milliseconds.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Pause.PrimePauseTestMethod.#ctor(Prime.TestMethods.Pause.IPrinter)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: printer to print Debug messages to Console..

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Pause.PrimePauseTestMethod.SleepTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the sleep time in milliseconds.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Pause.PrimePauseTestMethod.ExitPort
member.summary: Gets or sets return Port after Sleep Time. Range from 0 to 5. (Default=1).
